description: Small reviewable retrieval eval set for the local GI project-memory RAG.

cases.why: Exact command names should be found by keyword retrieval.

cases.query: restore startup context without reading the whole repository
cases.why: Startup retrieval must stay token-conscious and bounded.

cases.query: semantic search without locking the project to Chroma or one vector database
cases.why: Vector stores should remain adapters behind the RAG contract.

cases.query: project memory specifications that let another agent rebuild behavior on another framework
cases.why: Durable memory should preserve product behavior and verification, not only current code.

cases.query: where should an agent find external project folders git urls service roles and integration boundaries
cases.why: Agents need a durable register for connected projects before touching integrations or external folders.

cases.query: resolve runtime service URLs through config service instead of guessing ports
cases.why: Service lookup rules are exact enough for keyword retrieval and conceptual enough for semantic fallback.
